story.description: The interview with Chris Beckford conducted by Ruthanne Marchetti delves into Chris's family history, including his Jamaican and Rhode Island heritage, and the challenges he faced growing up with severe asthma and dermatitis. The conversation covers life in Bloomfield, highlighting the community's blend of cultures and the dynamics of racial integration, especially during his schooling years. A notable aspect discussed is his frequent run-ins with police due to racial profiling, offering insight into systemic issues. The interview also touches on societal changes, local challenges, and community experiences, portraying a multifaceted view of Bloomfield's past and present.
story.title: chris beckford 07142023.WAV
